title: Fx_Enabled, Fy_Enabled, Fz_Enabled Properties
description: Independently activates/inactivates, or returns the force control function or force trigger function of the translational direction.
notes: Independently activates/inactivates, or returns the force control function or force trigger function of the translational direction.
